factions.name: Terminids
factions.description: Insectoid creatures. Numerous and fast. Light armor most enemies, but some heavily plated heavies. Fire is highly effective.

factions.name: Automatons
factions.description: Robotic enemies. High armor ratings, ranged combatants. Precision targeting of weak points recommended. Fire is less effective.

factions.name: Illuminate
factions.description: Advanced alien civilization. Energy weapons and shields. Arc weapons effective. Mix of ranged and close combat.

enemies.name: Scavenger
enemies.description: Weakest Terminid. Swarms in large numbers. No armor.

enemies.name: Hunter
enemies.description: Fast leaping Terminid. Closes distance rapidly and pounces on targets.

enemies.name: Pouncer
enemies.description: Aggressive leaping bug. Pins targets on contact. Similar to Hunter but more dangerous.

enemies.name: Warrior
enemies.description: Medium-sized Terminid trooper. Basic combat unit.

enemies.name: Bile Warrior
enemies.description: Bile-spitting variant of the Warrior. Ranged acid attacks at medium distance.

enemies.name: Nursing Spewer
enemies.description: Green-tinged spewer that heals nearby Terminids. Priority target in groups.

enemies.name: Bile Spewer
enemies.description: Heavy Terminid that sprays corrosive bile. Thick armor on top, vulnerable belly.

enemies.name: Brood Commander
enemies.description: Larger Terminid commander. Medium-heavy armor.

enemies.name: Alpha Commander
enemies.description: Elite Terminid commander. Tougher and more aggressive than Brood Commanders.

enemies.name: Hive Guard
enemies.description: Defensive Terminid that protects nests and objectives. Heavy frontal shell.

enemies.name: Stalker
enemies.description: Stealthy Terminid. Cloaks and ambushes. Highly dangerous in groups.

enemies.name: Shrieker
enemies.description: Flying Terminid. Spawns from nests and dives at targets from above.

enemies.name: Impaler
enemies.description: Burrowing Terminid that attacks with underground tentacles at long range.

enemies.name: Charger
enemies.description: Heavily armored Terminid that charges at high speed. Aim for the legs.

enemies.name: Bile Titan
enemies.description: Massive Terminid. Virtually impenetrable frontal armor. Target the head or belly vents.

enemies.name: Bile Spitter
enemies.description: Small Terminid that spits acid projectiles at range. Low health but dangerous in groups.

enemies.name: Hopper
enemies.description: Jumping Terminid variant similar to the Hunter. Leaps great distances to close on targets quickly.

enemies.name: Shrieking Spewer
enemies.description: Flying spewer variant that attacks from the air while spraying bile. Combines aerial mobility with acid attacks.

enemies.name: Bile Charger
enemies.description: Bile-spewing variant of the Charger. Charges at high speed and leaves corrosive bile trails. Aim for the legs.

enemies.name: Dragonroach
enemies.description: A large flying Terminid that dominates the skies with devastating dive attacks.

enemies.name: Hive Lord
enemies.description: A gigantic Terminid that emerges from the ground. Extremely dangerous and heavily armored.

enemies.name: Alpha Warrior
enemies.description: An elite Warrior variant. Tougher and more aggressive than standard Warriors.

enemies.name: Charger Behemoth
enemies.description: An even larger and more heavily armored Charger variant. Devastating charge attacks.

enemies.name: Spore Charger
enemies.description: A Charger variant that releases toxic spore clouds as it charges. Combines impact and area denial.

enemies.name: Predator Hunter
enemies.description: Predator Strain Hunter. Faster and more lethal than standard Hunters.

enemies.name: Predator Stalker
enemies.description: Predator Strain Stalker. Enhanced cloaking and more deadly ambush attacks.

enemies.name: Rupture Warrior
enemies.description: Rupture Strain Warrior. Explodes on death dealing area damage.

enemies.name: Rupture Spewer
enemies.description: Rupture Strain Spewer. Spews explosive bile that detonates on impact.

enemies.name: Rupture Charger
enemies.description: Rupture Strain Charger. Detonates violently on death creating a massive explosion.

enemies.name: Spore Burst Scavenger
enemies.description: Spore Burst variant Scavenger. Releases toxic spore cloud on death.

enemies.name: Spore Burst Hunter
enemies.description: Spore Burst variant Hunter. Fast leaping attack, releases toxic spores on death.

enemies.name: Spore Burst Warrior
enemies.description: Spore Burst variant Warrior. Releases a large toxic spore cloud on death.

enemies.name: Trooper
enemies.description: Basic Automaton infantry. Light armor, armed with a rifle. Fights in groups.

enemies.name: Raider
enemies.description: Slightly armored Automaton trooper with better weapons. Often found flanking.

enemies.name: Marauder
enemies.description: Shielded Automaton trooper. Carries a physical shield that blocks frontal attacks.

enemies.name: Scout Strider
enemies.description: Two-legged Automaton walker. Pilot is vulnerable from behind. Armored front.

enemies.name: Berserker
enemies.description: Melee Automaton with dual chainsaws. Extremely dangerous at close range.

enemies.name: Commissar
enemies.description: Automaton officer that calls in reinforcement dropships. Priority target.

enemies.name: Devastator
enemies.description: Standard Automaton Devastator. Medium armor, versatile armament.

enemies.name: Scout Walker
enemies.description: Light Automaton mech. Fast and lightly armored compared to heavier walkers.

enemies.name: Gunship
enemies.description: Flying Automaton gunship. Heavy armor, rains fire from above. Target the engines.

enemies.name: Hulk
enemies.description: Massive Automaton. Heavy armor everywhere. Target the eye slits or back vents.

enemies.name: Automaton Tank
enemies.description: Heavily armored vehicle. Rotate and target the exhaust vent on its rear.

enemies.name: Dropship
enemies.description: Armored transport that delivers Automaton reinforcements. Destroy engines to prevent deployment.

enemies.name: Factory Strider
enemies.description: Colossal Automaton walker. Produces enemy reinforcements. Extreme armor.

enemies.name: Radical
enemies.description: The basic Cyborg unit. Light armor, fights in groups.

enemies.name: Agitator
enemies.description: An elite leadership variant of the Cyborgs. Calls in reinforcements when alerted.

enemies.name: War Strider
enemies.description: A heavy walker equipped with twin rapid-fire heavy plasma cannons. Extreme armor.

enemies.name: Vox Engine
enemies.description: A heavily armed and large armored Cyborg-driven war machine.

enemies.name: MG Devastator
enemies.description: Basic Devastator variant armed with a machine gun. Sustained fire at medium range.

enemies.name: Rocket Devastator
enemies.description: Devastator variant that fires volleys of rockets. Extremely dangerous at range. Destroy the rocket pods to disarm.

enemies.name: Heavy Devastator
enemies.description: Heavily armored Devastator variant with a shield and heavy weapon. Flank to bypass the shield.

enemies.name: Shield Devastator
enemies.description: Devastator variant carrying a large ballistic shield. Nearly impervious from the front. Attack from the sides or rear.

enemies.name: Rocket Strider
enemies.description: Scout Strider variant equipped with rocket launchers instead of a machine gun. Fires explosive salvos.

enemies.name: Jet Brigade Trooper
enemies.description: Jet-equipped Automaton trooper. Uses jumpjets to rapidly reposition and flank.

enemies.name: Jet Brigade MG Raider
enemies.description: Jet-equipped Raider armed with a machine gun. Aerial suppression fire.

enemies.name: Jet Brigade Devastator
enemies.description: Jet-equipped Devastator. Combines heavy firepower with aerial mobility.

enemies.name: Jet Brigade Hulk
enemies.description: Jet-equipped Hulk variant. Massive armored unit with aerial dash capability.

enemies.name: Pyro Trooper
enemies.description: Incineration Corps trooper armed with a flamethrower. Short range but deadly.

enemies.name: Conflagration Devastator
enemies.description: Incineration Corps Devastator with heavy incendiary weapons. Sets large areas ablaze.

enemies.name: Incendiary MG Devastator
enemies.description: Incineration Corps Devastator with incendiary machine gun. Fires igniting rounds.

enemies.name: Hulk Firebomber
enemies.description: Incineration Corps Hulk armed with incendiary mortar. Rains fire over large areas.

enemies.name: Watcher
enemies.description: Small Illuminate scouting drone. Alerts nearby units when it spots Helldivers.

enemies.name: Voteless
enemies.description: Basic Illuminate ground troop. Fires energy projectiles at range.

enemies.name: Overseer
enemies.description: Flying Illuminate commander. Lightly armored but dangerous from range.

enemies.name: Council Member
enemies.description: Shielded Illuminate caster. Projects energy shields and buffs nearby allies.

enemies.name: Illumination Drifter
enemies.description: Floating Illuminate unit. Medium armor, fires homing energy bolts.

enemies.name: Harvester
enemies.description: Tripod walker with shield projector. Target the legs to destabilize.

enemies.name: Obelisk
enemies.description: Massive stationary Illuminate defense structure. Projects devastating energy beams.

enemies.name: Illuminate Arbiter
enemies.description: Powerful Illuminate enforcer with both melee and ranged energy attacks. Heavy armor and energy shields.

enemies.name: Illuminate Collective
enemies.description: Illuminate swarm units that attack in large coordinated groups. Individually weak but dangerous en masse.

enemies.name: Illuminate Ascendant
enemies.description: Titan-class Illuminate hierarch. Commands devastating area-of-effect energy attacks and powerful shields. Target the exposed core.

enemies.name: Elevated Overseer
enemies.description: An advanced variant of the Overseer with enhanced energy weapons and greater durability.

enemies.name: Crescent Overseer
enemies.description: A defensive Overseer variant that projects crescent-shaped energy shields to protect allies.

enemies.name: Fleshmob
enemies.description: Illuminate swarm creature. Extremely weak individually but overwhelming in large numbers.

enemies.name: Stingray
enemies.description: Fast-moving Illuminate aerial unit that fires focused energy beam attacks.

enemies.name: Warp Ship
enemies.description: Illuminate transport vessel that warps in reinforcements. Destroy quickly to stop enemy flow.

enemies.name: Leviathan
enemies.description: Massive Illuminate war beast. The largest known Illuminate entity with devastating area attacks.

enemies.name: Obtruder
enemies.description: Illuminate Appropriator unit. Aggressively closes distance and disrupts Helldiver formations.

enemies.name: Gatekeeper
enemies.description: Illuminate Appropriator that controls area with energy barriers and portal technology.

enemies.name: Veracitor
enemies.description: Illuminate Appropriator enforcer. Powerful energy weapons and heavy armor plating.
